page_metadata.biotools__summary: MEYE is a free and open-source tool to perform pupillometry in real-time (or on videos) in different subjects (human and mice) and in different experimental conditions (head-fixation, virtual reality, 2-photon calcium imaging)
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MEYE is a free and open-source tool to perform pupillometry in real-time (or on videos) in different subjects (human and mice) and in different experimental conditions (head-fixation, virtual reality, 2-photon calcium imaging)
